nasb.text: John was clothed with camel’s hair and wore a leather belt around his waist, and his diet was locusts and wild honey.

esv.text: Now John was clothed with camel’s hair and wore a leather belt around his waist and ate locusts and wild honey.

cnv.text: 約翰身穿駱駝毛的衣服，腰束皮帶，吃的是蝗蟲和野蜜。

ccb.text: 约翰身穿骆驼毛的衣服，腰束皮带，吃的是蝗虫和野蜜。

csbs.text: 约翰穿的是骆驼毛的衣服，腰束皮带，吃的是蝗虫和野蜜。
